description: Display offer list page with status badges
acceptance_criteria: Log in as a user (e.g., alice@capitaloffer.com).
Verify that a list of offers is displayed.
Each offer card shows lender name, loan amount, interest rate, and term.
Each offer displays a status badge (e.g., new, pending, accepted, expired).
Verify pagination controls exist at the bottom.
Click 'Next' to navigate to the next page of results.
